name: Microsoft Corporation
business_description: Microsoft is a global technology platform company. Primary businesses are cloud infrastructure and platform services (Azure), productivity software (Microsoft 365, Dynamics), personal computing (Windows, Surface, Xbox), and an emerging AI services layer monetized across all segments.

known_risks.description: EU and US antitrust scrutiny on Azure bundling and Activision integration
AWS infrastructure scale advantage; Google AI silicon competitiveness
AI capex cycle - depreciation will weigh on operating margin FY26-27
